description: Scheduled morning briefing searched for master-slack skill using Glob pattern '**/*slack*' scoped to /sessions/.../mnt/jarvis (the IES root) but returned no results. Skill is located at .claude/skills/master-slack/SKILL.md — a hidden .claude directory at the IES root that glob searches miss without explicit path. David confirmed the skill exists. This is a repeat of err-20260327-004 and the pattern logged in entries_addendum_3 — searching skills/ instead of .claude/skills/ when the skill lives in the hidden directory.
correction: master-slack skill is at .claude/skills/master-slack/SKILL.md. When any skill search returns no results, always explicitly check .claude/skills/ as a fallback before declaring the skill missing. Correct path: {IES_ROOT}/.claude/skills/master-slack/SKILL.md.
systemic_fix: Skill search protocol: (1) check skills/_manifest.jsonl, (2) Glob skills/, (3) ALWAYS also check .claude/skills/ explicitly before reporting not found. The .claude/ directory is hidden and not traversed by default glob patterns. Add this as a hard rule to SYSTEM.md Skill Loading Protocol.
